category_sources: Official knock README describes a port-knocking server/client that detects knock sequences and runs events.
display_name_sources: Official repository heading is jvinet/knock and README says knock: A port-knocking implementation.
docs_sources: Official repository README documents purpose, building, examples, and client use.
Official repository contains a doc directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/jvinet/knock; per instruction, not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README describes port-hit sequences used to open and close SSH/firewall access.
